source_pr.title: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for testSerialSuite1
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: tison <wander4096@gmail.com>

Issue Number: close #33438

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ use_index_merge(t1, primary, t1a) */ * from t1 where id < 2 or a > 4 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1 1 1 1", "5 5 5 5 5")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ use_index_merge(t1, primary, t1a) */ * from t1 where id < 2 or a > 4 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1 1 1 1", "5 5 5 5 5")) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates the legacy executor `testSerialSuite1` from gocheck-style suites to testify. Framework migration can reduce flaky suite lifecycle / fixture issues by adopting modern `testing.T` + testify patterns.
fix_pattern: Migrate gocheck-based executor test suites to testify (modern Go `testing.T` patterns), updating suite setup/teardown and assertions.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ use_index_merge(t1, primary, t1a) */ * from t1 where id < 2 or a > 4 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1 1 1 1", "5 5 5 5 5")) (executor/executor_test.go)
